MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-12-2023 IN 206 -- APPEARANCE BY BRITTANY ROGERS, ESQ. (VIA COURTCALL) FOR PLAINTIFF ERIN LEA VANDERBERG; DAVID J. STREZA, ESQ. (IN PERSON) FOR DEFENDANTS KEVIN E. DILL, CATHY DILL, DILL FAMILY REVOCABLE TRUST -- PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 2/14/23 IS CONTINUED TO 9/5/23 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. EXPERT DISCOVERY TRACKS THE NEW TRIAL DATE. THE COURT ALSO ASSIGNS THE CASE TO A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO CONTACT THE COURT'S SETTLEMENT COORDINATOR, ELIZABETH KELBER, BY EMAIL FOR SCHEDULING OF THE MSC. THE COURT STATES THAT THE MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE TO BE DONE TWO MONTHS AHEAD OF THE TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
